voice.name: POLYGLOT
voice.description: Gender-neutral, 30s. Warm, even-toned announcer voice designed for multilingual narration. Clear articulation with a neutral, broadcast-friendly cadence.

qwen3-tts-0.6b.description: Default (language-neutral) clone prompt for the 0.6B model

qwen3-tts-0.6b-sample-audio.description: Default (language-neutral) sample audio for the 0.6B model

qwen3-tts-0.6b-es-clone-prompt.description: Spanish clone prompt for the 0.6B model

qwen3-tts-0.6b-es-sample-audio.description: Spanish sample audio for the 0.6B model

qwen3-tts-0.6b-fr-FR-clone-prompt.description: French (France) clone prompt for the 0.6B model

qwen3-tts-0.6b-fr-FR-sample-audio.description: French (France) sample audio for the 0.6B model

provenance.notes: Designed (no real person) voice demonstrating v0.4.0 optional per-language samples and clone prompts: a default/language-neutral pair plus Spanish (es) and French-France (fr-FR) variants for the same 0.6B model. A reader requesting (0.6b, 'es') resolves the Spanish pair; (0.6b, 'de') falls back to the default; (0.6b, 'es-MX') falls back to the base 'es'.

qwen3-tts.design_instruct: A warm, neutral, broadcast-friendly multilingual announcer with clear articulation.
